description:
This quiz tests a developer's proficiency with JavaScript's native Date API, focusing on date manipulation, formatting, and localization without relying on third-party libraries. It operates at an intermediate to advanced difficulty level, using a playful and encouraging tone to demystify the API's notoriously quirky design. The material is crafted to help developers build confidence in core language features.
Topics: JavaScript Date API, Date formatting, Localization, Native vs third-party libraries
Audience: JavaScript and frontend developers
